Clinical_Translation_English: Yes, my legs tend to swell in the evening, especially after strenuous work.

Doctor_English: Do you breastfeed your baby exclusively?
Patient_Yoruba: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni, omi ọmú nìkan ni mó ń fún un láti ìgbà tí wọ́n ti bí i.
Clinical_Translation_English: Yes, I only give him breast milk since he was born.

Direct_Translation_English: It usually happens in every day now, it also is difficult me to stand properly.

Doctor_English: Remember to keep the wound dry and clean, and change the dressing daily.
